form.formComment: Backs up 4 days after failing to impress last start; 6th (Fr6) over 2138m after racing wide at Albion Park, beaten 19 m by Five Oclock Gerry (2:38.40) in 3yo+ NR up to 60 on April 10 at $1.90. Showed ability the outing before when she won by 2.5 m when quickly away, (Fr1) at Albion Park (2:00.50) beating Koda Da Moda in 3yo+ NR up to 75 on March 31 at $5. Draws well so can bounce back.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Backs up 4 days after failing to impress last start; 6th (Fr6) over 2138m after racing wide at Albion Park, beaten 19 m by Five Oclock Gerry (2:38.40) in 3yo+ NR up to 60 on April 10 at $1.90. Showed ability the outing before when she won by 2.5 m when quickly away, (Fr1) at Albion Park (2:00.50) beating Koda Da Moda in 3yo+ NR up to 75 on March 31 at $5. Draws well so can bounce back.

form.formComment: Won three starts back at Albion Park over 2138m 3yo+ NR up to 55 on March 10. Last start 6th (Fr3) over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 8 m by Nellie Joy (2:00.50) in 3yo+ NR up to 75 on March 31 at $2.90. Bold showing expected from a low draw.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won three starts back at Albion Park over 2138m 3yo+ NR up to 55 on March 10. Last start 6th (Fr3) over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 8 m by Nellie Joy (2:00.50) in 3yo+ NR up to 75 on March 31 at $2.90. Bold showing expected from a low draw.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Contacted a sulky and broke gait near the 400. Driver fined careless driving.

form.formComment: Comes here in the right form. Won by a nose (Sr2) at Albion Park (2:38.40) beating Whirlwind Wilbur in 3yo+ NR up to 60 on April 10 at $41. Two runs back was well back in the run when 9th (Fr4) over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 25 m by Nellie Joy (2:00.50) in 3yo+ NR up to 75 on March 31 at $126. Not likely to threaten this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Comes here in the right form. Won by a nose (Sr2) at Albion Park (2:38.40) beating Whirlwind Wilbur in 3yo+ NR up to 60 on April 10 at $41. Two runs back was well back in the run when 9th (Fr4) over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 25 m by Nellie Joy (2:00.50) in 3yo+ NR up to 75 on March 31 at $126. Not likely to threaten this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted in and contacted marker pegs on the final corner.

form.formComment: Last start by 2 m (Fr4) at Albion Park (2:37.30) beating Laydownluna in 3yo+ NR up to 55 on April 7 at $4. Chance of back-to-back wins.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start by 2 m (Fr4) at Albion Park (2:37.30) beating Laydownluna in 3yo+ NR up to 55 on April 7 at $4. Chance of back-to-back wins.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Galloped at the start taking no competitive part in the race.
Broke at the start losing ground.

form.formComment: Racing in great heart. Last start by 3.5 m (40m Fr1) at Menangle (2:53.30) beating Gunner in No NR on March 10 at $4.20 at the bell was 8th-23.49. Sydney form is strong and he is likely to measure up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Racing in great heart. Last start by 3.5 m (40m Fr1) at Menangle (2:53.30) beating Gunner in No NR on March 10 at $4.20 at the bell was 8th-23.49. Sydney form is strong and he is likely to measure up.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, was well beaten after breaking at Albion Park on April 10. Before that 7th (Fr7) over 1660m at Albion Park beaten 13 m by Nellie Joy (2:00.50) in 3yo+ NR up to 75 on March 31 at $34. Must do a lot more.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't do much last time out, was well beaten after breaking at Albion Park on April 10. Before that 7th (Fr7) over 1660m at Albion Park beaten 13 m by Nellie Joy (2:00.50) in 3yo+ NR up to 75 on March 31 at $34. Must do a lot more.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke gait nearing the 600m point of the event.

form.formComment: Improved last start with a good run when 3rd (Fr5) over 1660m at Albion Park beaten 2.75 m by Nellie Joy (2:00.50) in 3yo+ NR up to 75 on March 31 at $4.60. Go well again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Improved last start with a good run when 3rd (Fr5) over 1660m at Albion Park beaten 2.75 m by Nellie Joy (2:00.50) in 3yo+ NR up to 75 on March 31 at $4.60. Go well again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Stepped away well to lead the event. Shifted in at times during the event.
Inclined to lay in under pressure in the run to the finish.
Broke gait shortly after the start.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into fifth behind Zealous Spur at Albion Park over 2138m in a 4yo+ No NR on March 28 at $12. Then a handy effort when beaten by 2.5 m finishing second behind Nellie Joy at Albion Park over 1660m in a 3yo+ NR up to 75 on March 31 at $18. Can be right in the thick of things.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Two back was well beaten into fifth behind Zealous Spur at Albion Park over 2138m in a 4yo+ No NR on March 28 at $12. Then a handy effort when beaten by 2.5 m finishing second behind Nellie Joy at Albion Park over 1660m in a 3yo+ NR up to 75 on March 31 at $18. Can be right in the thick of things.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted out in the front straight in the run to the finish.
Raced in a rearward marker peg position where it wanted to over race.
Unsuccessfully challenged for the lead over the early stages of the event.
